Title: Test creating a new task
Test Data:
- id: 1
- name: "Test Task"
- descrizione: "This is a test task"
- regione: "Lombardia"
- provincia: "Milano"
- stato: "In corso"
- dataInizio: "2023-03-01"
- dataFine: "2023-03-05"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the task creation page
2. Enter the task details
3. Click the "Crea Compito" button
Test Result:
- If the task is successfully created, the system should display a success message and the new task should be visible in the task list
- If an error occurs, the system should display an error message

Title: Test user-task relationship creation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user details page
2. Click the "Aggiungi Compito" button
3. Select a task
4. Enter the user-task relationship details

Test Result:
- If the user-task relationship is successfully created, the system should display a success message and the new user-task relationship should be visible in the user-task relationship list
- If an error occurs, the system should display an error message

Title: Test token creation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the user credentials
3. Click the "Login" button
Test Result:
- If the user is successfully authenticated, the system should generate a token and display it to the user
- If an error occurs, the system should display an error message

Title: Test user login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the user credentials
3. Click the "Login" button
Test Result:
- If the user is successfully authenticated, the system should display a success message and redirect the user to the home page
- If the user credentials are incorrect, the system should display an error message

Title: Test user logout
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page
2. Click the "Logout" button
Test Result:
- If the user is successfully logged out, the system should redirect the user to the login page

Title: Test emergency termination
Preconditions: User is authenticated and an emergency exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency details page
2. Click the "Termina Emergenza" button
Test Result:
- If the emergency is successfully terminated, the system should display a success message and the emergency should be removed from the emergency list
- If an error occurs, the system should display an error message

Title: Test terminating a user-task relationship
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user-task relationship details page
2. Click the "Termina UtenteCompito" button
Test Result:
- If the user-task relationship is successfully terminated, the system should display a success message and the user-task relationship should be removed from the user-task relationship list
- If an error occurs, the system should display an error message
